questionHtml: The missing section of insulation is 0.56 m long and the external radius of the pipe is 0.067 m. The emissivity of the pipe surface is 0.40. Determine the energy lost every second from the pipe surface. Ignore any absorption of radiation by the pipe surface.
markschemeHtml:
use of P=eσAT4 where T = 357 K ✓

use of A=2π r l « = 0.236 m2» ✓

P = 87 «W» ✓

 

Allow 85 – 89 W for MP3.

Allow ECF for MP3.

meta.title: The missing section of insulation is 0.56 m long and the external radius of the pipe is 0.067 m. The emissivity of the pipe surface is 0.40. Determine the energy lost every second
breadcrumbLabels: B. The particulate nature of matter
